name: EOG RESOURCES INC
summary: EOG Resources, Inc. is a Delaware corporation that explores for, develops, produces, and markets crude oil, natural gas liquids (NGLs), and natural gas. Operations are primarily in major U.S. producing basins including the Delaware Basin, South Texas (Eagle Ford and Dorado plays), Appalachian Basin (Utica play), and Rocky Mountain area, as well as offshore Trinidad, onshore Bahrain, and onshore United Arab Emirates.

products.name: Crude Oil and Condensate
products.description: Explored, developed, produced, and marketed from U.S. basins, Trinidad, Bahrain, and UAE.

products.name: Natural Gas Liquids (NGLs)
products.description: Extracted via EOG-owned or third-party processing facilities and sold at prevailing market prices.

products.name: Natural Gas
products.description: Produced and marketed across U.S. locations, Trinidad, and sold to a liquefaction facility near Corpus Christi, Texas.

partnerships.description: Farmout agreement signed in 2024 for design and construction of the Coconut Platform offshore Trinidad.
Exploration participation agreement signed February 2025 to evaluate a gas exploration prospect in Bahrain.
ADNOC has option to participate in production concession for Unconventional Onshore Block 3 in UAE after three-year appraisal.

partnerships.partner_name: National Gas Company of Trinidad and Tobago Limited
partnerships.description: Natural gas volumes from Trinidad sold under two natural gas sales arrangements.
Crude oil and condensate sold to Heritage Petroleum in Trinidad.
